== Notes for [[Item:Q117010|Q117010]] ==

http://fabpedigree.com/s086/f194343.htm

https://our-royal-titled-noble-and-commoner-ancestors.com/p3397.htm#i102020

https://translate.google.com/translate?hl=en&sl=pt&u=https://gw.geneanet.org/aqf%3Flang%3Den%26p%3Dpedro%2Bpires%2Bde%26n%3Dportel&prev=search&pto=aue

https://translate.google.com/translate?hl=en&sl=es&u=http://www.sologenealogia.com/gen/getperson.php%3FpersonID%3DI74939%26tree%3D001&prev=search&pto=aue
